name: Reka Flash 3
archDisplay: 21B dense transformer, reasoning model with 'budget forcing' CoT control, Llama-compatible
note: 21B from-scratch reasoning model with a novel budget-forcing mechanism; text-only despite the Reka name's multimodal history; rivals OpenAI o1-mini.
verificationNotes: CONFIRMED. reka.ai's official 'Reasoning with Reka Flash 3' post explicitly states release date March 10, 2025, 21B params, 32k context, Apache 2.0 license, and MMLU-Pro score of 'only 65.0' — matches record exactly. HF config.json confirms max_position_embeddings=32768 (32K), matching ctxK 32 (a separate secondary source's claim of 65,536 tokens was found to be inconsistent with the primary config.json and was disregarded). Current docs.reka.ai pricing confirms $0.20 input / $0.80 output exactly. No corrections required.
